en.text: Official book presentation — "Quality Assurance: From Fundamentals to Automation with AI"
Joined OpenLoop as QA Lead - Leading quality engineering initiatives across product delivery
Completed Introduction to R and Anomaly Detection program at Universidad Austral, Buenos Aires
Achieved ISTQB Certified Tester Advanced Level - Test Automation Engineering v2.0
